demo_timestamps.description: Conversational AI chatbot proof of concept using MCP servers
Creating a project in Autodesk Construction Cloud's test environment
BIM expert agent counting elements in a 3D model

themes: AI and Digital Transformation in Construction

client_mentions.name: TBI
client_mentions.context: A construction firm focused on strategic alignment of digitization

ai_technologies.name: Copilot
ai_technologies.context: Used as an orchestrator in a chatbot system to process user inputs

ai_technologies.name: MCP
ai_technologies.context: Framework to deploy MCP servers quickly used in AI integration

summary: The video showcases TBI's integration of AI tools and digitalization in their operations using Autodesk technologies like Revit and APS, focusing on a proof of concept for a conversational AI chatbot through Co-Pilot and MCP servers. It demonstrates how AI agents within the Autodesk Construction Cloud can automate tasks such as project creation and element counting using natural language, highlighting the transformative potential of AI in organizational workflows.
